1) Evaluate constructors on controller and extensions

2) If there’s a <apex:form> element, create the view state

3) Evaluate expressions, <apex:page> attribute actions, and other method calls (getters/setters) on main page

4) Evaluate constructors, extensions, and expression on attribute definitions on any custom components present5) Send HTML to Browser
records.B__c:
1) Evaluate constructors, extensions, and expression on attribute definitions on any custom components present

2) Evaluate constructors on controller and extensions

3) Evaluate expressions, <apex:page> attribute actions, and other method calls (getters/setters) on main page

4) If there’s a <apex:form> element, create the view state

5) Send HTML to Browser
records.C__c:
1) Evaluate constructors on controller and extensions

2) Evaluate constructors, extensions, and expression on attribute definitions on any custom components present

3) Evaluate expressions, <apex:page> attribute actions, and other method calls (getters/setters) on main page

4) If there’s a <apex:form> element, create the view state

5) Send HTML to Browser
records.Comment__c:
コンストラクタ見る

コンポーネントがあれば、再度コンポーネントのコンストラクタを見にゆく

<apex:page>内部を評価

<apex:form>があればビューステートを作成

ブラウザにHTMLを送信
